commands: echo === test: launch minimal container via nerdctl with nvidia runtime ===
nerdctl --namespace k8s.io run --rm --runtime nvidia --gpus all nvidia/cuda:12.6.2-base-ubuntu22.04 nvidia-smi 2>&1 | head -20 || echo fail
nerdctl --namespace k8s.io run --rm --gpus all nvidia/cuda:12.6.2-base-ubuntu22.04 nvidia-smi 2>&1 | head -20 || echo fail
